description:
A craft artist is launching their WooCommerce store. Configure the store's payment methods to enable 'Direct bank transfer' (BACS) and 'Check payments', and disable 'Cash on delivery'.

The 'Direct bank transfer' (BACS) method should use the title 'Direct Bank Transfer', the description 'Make your payment directly into our bank account. Please use your Order ID as the payment reference.', and the instructions 'Payment must be received within 5 business days. Your order will be processed once funds are confirmed.' Include one bank account for 'Artisan Pottery Co' (Account: 12345678, Bank: First National Bank, Sort Code: 01-02-03, IBAN: US64FNBK12345678901234, BIC/SWIFT: FNBKUS33).

The 'Check payments' method should use the title 'Check Payments', the description 'Pay by mailing a check to our studio.', and the instructions 'Please make your check payable to "Artisan Pottery Co" and mail to: 456 Clay Avenue, Portland, OR 97201. Please include your Order ID on the check memo line.'

Ensure 'Cash on delivery' is disabled.
